uplink.description: Synthetic cooling-mode keepalive (in-bounds; expected from running reference/upstream-codec.js)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds bytes; expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (oracle) and mapping sensorTemperature->air.temperature, relativeHumidity->air.relativeHumidity, rest -> camelCase extras.

uplink.description: Non-keepalive packet type returns an error (command/config response not modeled)
uplink._note: Synthetic command-response frame (leading byte != 0x01); the keepalive-only decode rejects it.

uplink.description: Truncated keepalive payload returns an error
uplink._note: Synthetic short payload; fewer than the 11 bytes the fixed keepalive layout requires.
